name: OpenCode CLI Agent
description: Agent backend that shells out to the developer's installed `opencode` binary. Zero-config: uses the developer's existing model login — no API keys needed (goal §1.1, A13). Detected on PATH via native-agent detection. Uses `opencode run --format json` (the one-shot non-interactive mode, verified against opencode-ai 1.16.2). Implements P-plugin-3 Agent adapter. Completes the three-binary zero-config wedge (claude + codex + opencode).
